Charleston, South Carolina

Charleston, South Carolina

[Posting Guidelines](https://www.legacy.com/guestbooks/posting-guidelines.aspx?n=james-drayton&pid=135907628) \| [FAQ](https://www.legacy.com/guestbooks/faq.aspx?n=james-drayton&pid=135907628)

To Mack & Gene,

I am sorry to hear of the passing of your brother. May God bless your family and you all find comfort knowing God is with you always.

Alice Butler Ravenel

November 19, 2009 \| Wadmalaw Isl, SK

To the family of James ( Bunny) ,my deepest sympathy ,because we care we,re saddened by the grief youre feeling now.I know that the love of friends will help to see you through and that time will bring you brighter days. I will miss seeing him when his sisters come to Augusta to see Mack and Debbie, love yolanda deal & family

yolanda deal

November 18, 2009 \| Hephzibah, GA

My page has turned

a chapter's closed

a brand new page

for me unfolds

and my new page

will never turn

nor for the old page

will I yearn

for my new page

is Heaven, you see

I'm home with Jesus

for eternity.

Lavontinette Richards

November 18, 2009 \| Ridgeville, SC

there is one thing that makes me cry

and life is sometimes so unfair

we had no time to say goodbye

so i just hope you know i care

and i still see u in my dreams

when i can hear your voice once more

and as i wake up it still seems

that u could walk right thru the door

tho i know that can never be

my prayers are out there as wide as the sea

i remember you said i'll see you later

but you up and left us, Take care Opertor.

Michael Smith

November 18, 2009 \| Petersfield

No bond is as great as that between a parent and child. My deepest condolences are with you as you grieve.

Liz Mckenzie

November 16, 2009 \| North Charleston, SC

To the Drayton Family, We are so sorry for your lost. We know that you are going through a hard time right now but God will see you through. Bunny is in a better place now and the suffering is over. Just keep looking to the hills from which your help comes from. God puts no more on you than you can bear. God Bless Your Entire Family

Sis.Lily Grampus and Family

November 16, 2009 \| Hollywood, SC

In My Pocket

I have memories in my pocket.

They rattle among the change.

My memories of you are treasures I carry wherever I go.

They are stored in bits and pieces, parts of a beautiful whole

They give me comfort when I think I am alone.

Yes, I have memories in my pocket, like so much other stuff I keep there.

But of all the treasures I have, it’s the memories of you that are the most precious.

DESIREE CHAPLIN/HOLMES

November 16, 2009 \| RAVENEL, SC

In My Pocket

I have memories in my pocket.

They rattle among the change.

My memories of you are treasures I carry wherever I go.

They are stored in bits and pieces, parts of a beautiful whole

They give me comfort when I think I am alone.

Yes, I have memories in my pocket, like so much other stuff I keep there.

But of all the treasures I have, it’s the memories of you that are the most precious.

November 16, 2009

IF GOD BRINGS YOU TO IT

HE WILL BRING YOU THROUGH IT

DIFFICULT MOMENTS(PRAISE GOD!)

PAINFUL MOMENTS(WORSHIP GOD!)

EVERY MOMENT(THANK GOD!)

FOR TIMES SPENT WITH(BUNNY)

JACUELINE SMITH

November 16, 2009 \| CONYERS, GA
